encoding=utf8 2 3 from flask import Flask, request, Response, make_response, url_for 4 import string 5 import subprocess 6 import os 7 import re 8 import cgi 9 import urllib 10 import sys 11 from constants import * 12 13 from phantomjs import Phantom 14 15 import logging 16 17 logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO) 18 19 reload(sys) 20 sys.setdefaultencoding('utf8') 21 22 flags = open('secret.txt').read().split() 23 24 app = Flask(__name__) 25 app.config['PROPAGATE_EXCEPTIONS'] = True 26 27 phantom = Phantom() 28 29 @app.route('/') 30 def index(): 31 return INDEX_CONTENT 32 33 def check_xss(page,flag,msg,tag): 34 proc = subprocess.Popen(["timeout","5","phantomjs", "check.js"], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stdin=subprocess.PIPE) 35 fn = "static/" + os.urandom(16).encode('hex') + '.html' 36 url = 'http://localhost:5000/' + fn 37 try: 38 of = open(fn, 'w') 39 of.write(page) 40 of.close() 41 print "Page:" 42 print page 43 proc.stdin.write(url) 44 proc.stdin.close() 45 result = proc.stdout.readline().strip() 46 print "Resultado:" 47 print result 48 49 finally: 50 os.unlink(fn) 51 52 if msg == "": 53 data = '

Let the game begin. Good Luck
'.format(IMAGE_ROUTES[tag]['start']) 54 else: 55 if result == 'XSS': 56 data = '

Congratulations!

Here is the flag: {1}

'.format(IMAGE_ROUTES[tag]['success'],flag) 57 elif result: 58 data = '

Oops! You did an alert with {1} instead of "XSS"
'.format(IMAGE_ROUTES[tag]['process'], cgi.escape(result)) 59 else: 60 data = '

Failed! Try again!
'.format(IMAGE_ROUTES[tag]['error']) 61 return data 62 63 64 ############## HARD #################### 65 66 @app.route('/page',methods=['GET', 'POST']) 67 def xss32(): 68 msg = request.form.get('name','') 69 blacklist = string.lowercase + string.uppercase + string.digits + '<>' # Needs to be exploited with JSfuck 70 value = "" if msg == "" else '{0}'.format(msg) 71 72 for word in blacklist: 73 if word in msg: 74 error_msg = """
Sorry you can't use: '%s'
""" % word 75 return XSS_CONTENT_TEXTAREA_POST.format("32","Umbrella",value,"",error_msg) 76 77 script_content = """
""" % msg 78 data = XSS_CONTENT_TEXTAREA_POST.format("32","Umbrella",value,"",script_content) 79 80 result= check_xss(data,flags[0],msg,'xss_hard') 81 response = make_response(XSS_CONTENT_TEXTAREA_POST.format("32","Umbrella",value, result, script_content)) 82 response.headers["X-XSS-Protection"] = "0" 83 return response 84 85 if __name__ == '__main__': 86 #app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=5001, threaded=True) 87 app.run(debug=True) === check.js === 1 var system = require('system'); 2 // var json = JSON.parse(system.args[1]); 3 // var input = json.url; 4 var input = system.stdin.readLine(); 5 6 var page = require("webpage").create(); 7 8 page.onAlert = function(msg) { 9 console.log(msg); 10 }; 11 12 page.onConfirm = function(msg) { 13 console.log(msg); 14 }; 15 16 page.onPrompt = function(msg) { 17 console.log(msg); 18 }; 19 20 page.open(input, function(status) { 21 print(status) 22 if (status === "success") { 23 // Wait for the page to load 24 setTimeout(function() { 25 // Trigger events that may not naturally fire in a headless environment 26 page.evaluate(function() { 27 // Dispatch "focus" event to elements that may have "autofocus" or "onfocus" handlers 28 var elements = document.querySelectorAll('[autofocus], [onfocus]'); 29 Array.prototype.forEach.call(elements, function(el) { 30 var event = document.createEvent('Events'); 31 event.initEvent('focus', true, false); 32 el.dispatchEvent(event); 33 }); 34 }); 35 36 // Optionally, add more events here like "mouseover" if needed 37 // Ensure to wait a bit before terminating PhantomJS to allow event handlers to execute 38 setTimeout(function() { 39 phantom.exit(); 40 }, 1000); // Adjust timeout as necessary based on observed behavior 41 42 }, 1000); // Initial delay to allow the page to fully load and scripts to initialize 43 } else { 44 console.log("Failed to load the page."); --- iter 5 bash --- $ cat <<'EOF' STACK: Docker exposes Flask 1.1.4/Werkzeug 1.0.1 on Python 2.7.18 directly on :9109; app invokes system phantomjs via subprocess timeout 5 to evaluate generated static HTML; no DB/proxy. SURFACE: GET / renders index; GET/POST /page with form field name; Flask static files under /static; PhantomJS callbacks alert/confirm/prompt captured from generated page. BUG-HYP: src/app.py:68-80 reflects POST name into a JavaScript string at line 77 with only an alnum/< > blacklist at lines 69-75, then checks PhantomJS alert output in line 55. Non-alphanumeric JavaScript (JSFuck) can break out of the string and call alert("XSS"). WHY: constants.py:151-175 places reflected value into HTML; app.py line 77 constructs

Congratulations!

Here is the flag: FLAG{e4f036b6195132777c3c4a79c8595f87a0dec04146a8c8ab795758180a74e873}
